evidence.scientific_clarity: Architecture diagram clearly shows RetroDiff pipeline: Query → Retriever/KB (Retrieval group) → Diffusion Decoder (Generation group) → Generated Sample, with dashed Prior Network feedback arrow; solid vs. dashed arrow convention is legible.
evidence.typography: Script does not set pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (bitmap-rasterised) DejaVu Sans fonts embedded in the PDF, making text non-selectable/non-editable; default DejaVu Sans font family used throughout.
evidence.palette: Group backgrounds use light blue vs. light red which is not color-blind safe (red/green confusion axis is avoided but blue/orange standard CB palette not used); node fill colors (blue, white, yellow) are broadly distinguishable but not from a verified CB-safe palette.
evidence.layout_density: Five-row vertical layout uses the 5.5×6.5-inch canvas reasonably; the two-column arrangement (main nodes left, KB/Prior right) avoids overlapping labels; minor vertical whitespace between groups but no egregious gaps or clipping.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately matches figure content and describes arrow conventions; legend present at lower right; 'condition' side-label is small (font 6) and may draw a reviewer comment; no numerical claim in this architecture-only diagram is appropriate given the brief.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is saved but fonttype=42 is NOT set, so fonts are embedded as Type 3 bitmaps (confirmed by pdffonts: EVICAO+DejaVuSans-Bold, etc., all Type 3); text is not selectable or scalable in the PDF.
evidence.file_format: All four required files exist and are non-trivial: figure.pdf (26 KB), figure.png (50 KB), caption.tex (481 B), gen_figure.py (5.3 KB); bonus figure.svg also present.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption uses bold title, explains data-flow and control-flow conventions, identifies all labelled nodes by name, and notes the dashed group boxes — appropriate detail for a structural architecture figure with no quantitative data.

overall_strengths: Clear, self-contained architecture diagram that faithfully renders the pipeline described in the brief, with correct solid/dashed arrow semantics and labelled group rectangles.
All required output files are present and non-trivial; caption is thorough and precisely matches figure content.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=0) are not set, so the PDF embeds Type 3 bitmap fonts — text is not selectable, searchable, or editable in the vector file.
Default DejaVu Sans font family is used without override, and the color palette (group backgrounds, node fills) is not drawn from a verified color-blind-safe set.
